requirement_topic.en: Sea transport — UN 38.3 and IMDG dangerous-goods classification

summary.en: All BESS lithium-ion batteries shipped to Tonga require UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) and IMDG Code compliance. Tonga imports by sea through Nuku'alofa, and dangerous-goods customs handling requires complete IMDG documentation aligned with local handling practice.
summary.zh: 向汤加发运的所有BESS锂离子电池必须符合UN 38.3（《关于危险货物运输的建议书——测试和标准》第三部分第38.3节）及IMDG公约要求。汤加主要通过努库阿洛法海运进口，危险货物海关处理要求提交与当地处理流程一致的完整IMDG文件。
summary.zht: 向湯加發運的所有BESS鋰離子電池必須符合UN 38.3（《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——測試和標準》第三部分第38.3節）及IMDG公約要求。湯加主要通過努庫阿洛法海運進口，危險貨物海關處理要求提交與當地處理流程一致的完整IMDG文件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Rev.7, 2019 + Amend. 1)
IMDG Code 2022 (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, Amendment 41-22)
SOLAS 1974 as amended (Chapter VII — Carriage of Dangerous Goods)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 documentation for export of lithium batteries under GB/T 28164-2011 and national dangerous-goods logistics controls. Chinese exporters commonly use accredited Chinese labs, and reports are internationally valid where lab accreditation is acceptable.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 28164-2011及国家危险品物流管理要求进行锂电池出口UN 38.3文件管理。中国出口商常使用认可实验室测试，若实验室认证可被接受，报告在国际上通用。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 28164-2011及國家危險品物流管理要求進行鋰電池出口UN 38.3文件管理。中國出口商常使用認可實驗室測試，若實驗室認證可被接受，報告在國際上通用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications — transport tests)
IATA DGR (as relevant for air side controls)

gap.en: UN 38.3 is harmonized internationally, so a valid report from an accredited lab is generally accepted. Practical Tonga gaps are scope and logistics: (1) report must match exact cell models and shipment configurations; (2) some BESS modules may require module/system-level evidence beyond cell-level testing; (3) IMDG documentation (DGD, SDS, packing certificate) must be complete and accurate; and (4) SOC limits must be applied for marine cargo handling.
gap.zh: UN 38.3在国际上是统一标准，经过认可实验室出具的有效报告通常可被接受。汤加的实际差距在于适用范围与物流：(1)报告必须覆盖具体电芯型号与出运配置；（2）部分BESS模组可能需要模组/系统级证据，不仅是电芯级；（3）IMDG文件（危险货物申报单、安全数据表、装箱证）必须完整准确；（4）海运SOC限制需按规定应用。
gap.zht: UN 38.3在國際上是統一標準，經認可實驗室出具的有效報告通常可被接受。湯加的實際差距在於適用範圍與物流：（1）報告必須覆蓋具體電芯型號與出運配置；（2）部分BESS模組可能需要模組/系統級證據，不僅是電芯級；（3）IMDG文件（危險品申報單、安全數據表、裝箱證）必須完整準確；（4）海運SOC限制需按規定應用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IMDG and UN requirements for all sea freight of lithium batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export and often already held by Chinese exporters

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 remains a shared global baseline. For Tonga imports to Nuku'alofa, exporters should verify configuration scope before sailing, and also ensure IMDG documentation for sea transport is complete. Non-compliant reporting at sea port clearance is a common cause of detention.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3仍是全球统一基线。面向努库阿洛法的汤加进口，出口商须在开航前核实配置范围，并确保海运IMDG文件齐全。海运口岸申报不合规是常见扣船风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3仍是全球統一基礎。面向努庫阿洛法的湯加進口，出口商須在開航前核實配置範圍，並確保海運IMDG文件齊全。海運口岸申報不合規是常見扣船風險。

requirement_topic.en: Transport safety — IEC 62281 and system-level handling
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——IEC 62281与系统级处理
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——IEC 62281與系統級處理

summary.en: IEC 62281:2019 complements UN 38.3 by specifying transport safety requirements for lithium cells and batteries, including external short circuit, overcharge, forced discharge, and mechanical abuse protections. Tonga references IEC transport safety expectations where project buyers or EPCs include battery-shipment annexes.
summary.zh: IEC 62281:2019在UN 38.3基础上进一步规定了锂电池运输安全要求，包括外部短路、过充、强制放电和机械损伤防护。汤加项目买方或EPC在BESS运输附件中通常引用IEC运输安全预期。
summary.zht: IEC 62281:2019在UN 38.3基礎上進一步規定了鋰電池運輸安全要求，包括外部短路、過充、強制放電和機械損傷防護。湯加項目買方或EPC在BESS運輸附件中通常引用IEC運輸安全預期。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport)

summary.en: GB/T 28164-2011 and relevant GB transport clauses in GB 38031/GB/T 36276 are China’s documented pathway. Many products have UN 38.3 compliance only; IEC 62281 is an additional step often needed for Tonga project documentation.
summary.zh: GB/T 28164-2011及GB 38031、GB/T 36276中的运输条款构成中国的文件路径。许多产品仅持有UN 38.3符合性，IEC 62281在汤加项目文件中常为额外要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 28164-2011及GB 38031、GB/T 36276中的運輸條款構成中國的文件路徑。許多產品僅持有UN 38.3符合性，IEC 62281在湯加項目文件中常為額外要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries — portable applications — transport tests)

gap.en: For Tonga shipments where required, IEC 62281 is additive to UN 38.3 and may drive additional evidence requirements. Exporters with only UN 38.3 documentation should request IEC 62281 scope expansion from their certification body before loading at Nuku'alofa-bound cargo.
gap.zh: 如汤加项目要求，IEC 62281为UN 38.3的补充并可能引入更多证据要求。仅有UN 38.3文件的出口商应在向努库阿洛法开航前向认证机构申请IEC 62281覆盖范围扩展。
gap.zht: 如湯加項目要求，IEC 62281為UN 38.3之補充並可能引入更多證據要求。僅有UN 38.3文件的出口商應在向努庫阿洛法開航前向認證機構申請IEC 62281覆蓋範圍擴展。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Tonga BESS projects requiring IEC transport safety package
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory mandatory equivalent in some Chinese fixed-storage exports

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 alone may be insufficient in Tonga-referenced scopes; IEC 62281:2019 evidence is often requested for complete project acceptance. Chinese exporters should align both standards where shipment risk profile or buyer terms require this documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在汤加引用范围内，UN 38.3可能不足；IEC 62281:2019证据通常被要求用于项目完整验收。出口商应当在风险特征或买方条款要求下同步提供两套标准依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在湯加引用範圍內，UN 38.3可能不足；IEC 62281:2019證據通常被要求用於項目完整驗收。出口商應在風險特徵或買方條款要求下同步提供兩套標準依據。

requirement_topic.en: Port of entry and customs — Nuku'alofa
requirement_topic.zh: 入境港口与海关——努库阿洛法
requirement_topic.zht: 入境港口與海關——努庫阿洛法

summary.en: Nuku'alofa is the principal commercial entry point for Tonga energy imports. All BESS imports are planned through its port logistics chain. Tonga customs and dangerous-goods workflows commonly require English-language import documents, pre-clearance notification, and full dangerous-goods handling packets for high-energy batteries.
summary.zh: 努库阿洛法是汤加能源进口的主要商业口岸。BESS进口通常按该港口物流链进行。汤加海关与危险货物流程通常要求英文进口文件、危险品预通报和完整的高能电池处理资料包。
summary.zht: 努庫阿洛法是湯加能源進口的主要商業口岸。BESS進口通常按該港口物流鏈進行。湯加海關與危險貨物流程通常要求英文進口文件、危險品預通報及完整的高能電池處理資料包。

standards_or_laws: Tonga Customs and Revenue Service requirements (cargo declaration framework)

summary.en: China export procedures also require pre-departure customs declaration and dangerous-goods filings, but documentation is often generated in Mandarin and structured for Chinese agencies. For Tonga entry, alignment to English declarations and recipient-side handling expectations remains mandatory.
summary.zh: 中国出口同样要求离港报关与危险品申报，但文件通常为中文并按国内机构结构。面向汤加入境时，必须改为英文申报并满足收货方物流与口岸处理要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口同樣要求離港報關與危險品申報，但文件通常為中文並按國內機構結構。面向湯加入境時，必須改為英文申報並滿足收貨方物流與口岸處理要求。

standards_or_laws: GACC — China Customs export declaration requirements

gap.en: Logistics gap in Tonga is operational rather than technical: long lead chains to Nuku'alofa, limited cargo handling capacity for heavy or oversized BESS consignments, and strict documentation sequence before vessel arrival. Full English documentation and dangerous-goods handling confirmation is required before acceptance at the destination port.
gap.zh: 汤加的差距主要体现在运营层面：往返努库阿洛法的航运周期长，港口对重型或超限BESS货物处理能力有限，且船到前必须完成文件流程。到港前需提交完整英文材料并完成危险品处理确认。
gap.zht: 湯加的差距主要體現在營運層面：往返努庫阿洛法的航運周期長，港口對重型或超限BESS貨物處理能力有限，且船到前必須完成文件流程。到港前需提交完整英文材料並完成危險品處理確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — port customs handling for all dangerous goods sea cargo to Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export; not a substitute question for Tonga

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Tonga imports, all BESS cargo is expected to route through Nuku'alofa with pre-aligned dangerous-goods handling and customs sequence. Chinese exporters should partner early with a Tonga-compliant logistics provider and ensure English-language documents and shipment conditions are complete before departure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加进口的所有BESS货物预计通过努库阿洛法进港，并要求危险品处理与海关流程预对接。中国出口商应尽早与符合汤加要求的物流商合作，确保出运前英文文件与运输条件完整。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加進口的所有BESS貨物預計通過努庫阿洛法進港，並要求危險品處理與海關流程預對接。中國出口商應儘早與符合湯加要求的物流商合作，確保出運前英文文件與運輸條件完整。
